description: Lifeline adapter for the shared _stack Codex inbox/worktree runner.

notes: Fresh worktrees do not carry repo-local node_modules, so verification bootstrap runs before the grouped Lifeline verify commands.
Lifeline is self-hosted and non-Vercel in this phase; keep verification repo-local and centered on the TypeScript CLI, deterministic suites, and smoke suites already defined in the repo.
Do not add dispatcher-level multi-repo orchestration, Vercel deploy logic, or cross-repo mutation policy from the Lifeline adapter.

docsUpdateRules: If Lifeline command surface, runtime behavior, manifest contract, or startup contract changes, keep README.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/contracts/app-manifest.md, docs/startup-contract.md, docs/testing.md, and docs/CHANGELOG.md aligned in the same change or immediately after.

If grouped verify runners, smoke suite wiring, or helper-script invocation changes, keep README.md and docs/testing.md aligned and prefer the existing suite-runner entrypoints over inventing one-off verification commands.
Keep Lifeline repo-local and self-hosted in this phase; do not route Lifeline adapter work through Vercel or expand _stack into dispatcher-level multi-repo Codex orchestration from this adapter.
